news.t: Nuclear Energy Is More Than AI
Solving the Structural AI Power Deficit
AI Pivot: Electrification Infrastructure in Focus
Astera Labs Leads SMRF's 21% Gain on AI Infrastructure
SS&C ALPS Advisors Launches Actively Managed ETF Targeting SMR, Nuclear and Technology Opportunities

holdings.infoBox: SMRF is an equity ETF with a total of 96 individual holdings. The top holdings are BWX Technologies stock at 4.35%, CGN Power at 4.08%, Cameco at 4.02%, GE Vernova at 3.88%, and National Atomic Company Kazatomprom JSC at 3.81%.

overview.description: The ALPS Nautilus SMR, Nuclear & Technology ETF (SMRF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in the nuclear and small modular reactor value chain around the world, as well as up to 25% in artificial intelligence companies. The fund also employs a call and put strategy for additional income. SMRF was launched on Feb 18, 2026 and is issued by SS&C.
